def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    idx = 0
    t = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    for _ in range(t):
        n = int(data[idx])
        m = int(data[idx+1])
        k = int(data[idx+2])
        idx += 3
        base = n // m
        rem = n % m
        players = list(range(1, n+1))
        for game in range(k):
            table_counts = [base+1 if i < rem else base for i in range(m)]
            start = 0
            for i in range(m):
                cnt = table_counts[i]
                print(cnt, end=' ')
                print(' '.join(map(str, players[start:start+cnt])))
                start += cnt
            players = players[rem:] + players[:rem]

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
